properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v6 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Humbly I wait Here in Your presence Oh, how I need You Quiet my soul I long for Your whisper Oh, how I need You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As I worship in surrender I feel Heaven drawing closer As I lay down my defenses Your love invades And I brace for the impact

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I am undone Lost in Your glory Oh, how I love You Covered in grace Found in Your mercy Oh, how I love You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: As I worship in surrender I feel Heaven drawing closer As I lay down my defenses Your love invades And I brace for the impact I brace for the impact Oh ooh ooh

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Love like a mighty river, like a rushing wind Sweeps through me, right through me Love like a thousand oceans, like a symphony Sweeps through me, right through me

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: As I worship in surrender I feel Heaven drawing closer As I lay down my defenses Oh, Your love invades And I brace for the impact
